title: Immersive Frequencies
description: Talk across any distance with walkie talkies.
body:
![LOGO DESC](https://i.imgur.com/1LweycJ.png)

### What's it about?
This mod adds walkie talkies that let you talk to other players across the map. Perfect for survival servers, roleplay, or just staying in touch while exploring.

### Requirements
- **[Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat/versions)** - Required
- [**Fabric API**](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) - Only required for fabric versions

### How to use
1. Craft a walkie talkie
2. Set a frequency (In the GUI, Default key is `R`)
3. Hold the talk key to broadcast
4. Others on the same frequency will hear you

That's it. Have fun!

### Credits
- **armilp02** - Developer
- [**JPZamps**](https://modrinth.com/user/JPZamps) - Artist
- [**SkyNetCloud**](https://modrinth.com/user/SkyNetCloud) - Dev of fabric version

### Future plans
- More walkie talkies with different ranges and features.
- Customizable frequencies and channels.
- Add antenas for amplifying the signal.
- Add a radio block that can broadcast to all frequencies or specific ones.
- And more! Stay tuned for updates.
